heading: mongot Process Not Installed or Running
body:
The following error is returned if you run `$search` queries when
the MongoDB Search `mongot` process isn't installed or running:

```shell
MongoError: Remote error from mongot :: caused by :: Error connecting to localhost:28000.
```

The `mongot` process is installed only when the first MongoDB Search index is
defined. If you don't have any MongoDB Search index in your cluster,
create at least one MongoDB Search index to resolve this error.

codeBlocks.content: MongoError: Remote error from mongot :: caused by :: Error connecting to localhost:28000.
